description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the java:8-alpine Docker image and sets the GRADLE_OPTS variable to "-Dorg.gradle.daemon=false". Include a before_script that runs `export GRADLE_USER_HOME=$(pwd)/.gradle`. Define a single stage called build and add a build job (named build) in that stage that uses a cache keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, caching the "build" and ".gradle" directories with a push policy, and executes the exact command `./gradlew --build-cache assemble`. The job has no additional rules or artifacts and runs on every pipeline execution.
